root_cause: No live feeds because the scheduled/manual execution path broke on auth: `feed-orchestrator` and `ingest-rss` were deployed with `verify_jwt=true`, admin JWT invocation returned `401 Invalid JWT`, and the pipeline then stopped after 2026-03-10T07:50:07Z, leaving only insecure anonymous invocation able to run the feed functions before the auth guard was hardened.

scheduler_shape_proof.evidence: Anonymous POST {} to feed-orchestrator produced new feed_run_log rows from 00:37:06Z through 00:38:35Z, including success rows for MIT Tech Review AI, Yonhap News Korea, PBL Magazine UK, Glossy, CEW, PR Newswire Beauty, Nails Magazine, Scratch Magazine, Skin Therapy Letter, and Wellbeing Magazine.

ingestion_run_health.minimal_tracing_assessment: feed_run_log already records run_id, feed_id, started_at, finished_at, status, signals_created, items_fetched, and error_message. Additional tracing is only needed if per-item errors or orchestrator batch IDs are required.

refresh_live_data.evidence: refresh-live-data was not present in `supabase functions list` for project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi during this audit.

invocation_guard_audit.summary: `verify_jwt=false` is a deploy-time setting only. Runtime access is enforced inside each function before any feed work starts.

request_shape_guards: `batch_size` defaults to 10 and is clamped to 25.
`limit` defaults to 100 and is clamped to 500.

invocation_guard_audit.rate_limiting: There is no separate anonymous rate limiter because anonymous requests are rejected before work begins. The current protection is bearer auth plus bounded request shapes.

evidence: useIntelligence applies DB-level `tier_min='free'` plus a 14-day freshness window for free users.
useIntelligence applies a two-pass fallback for narrow verticals when strict results are below 8 rows.
useIntelligence defaults to `limit=50`, which is large enough for the restored inventory.
With 417 rows total and 316 rows updated in the last 24h at snapshot time, empty boards were not caused by pagination or gating once ingestion resumed.
notes: The `beauty_brand` fallback topic list references `brand_growth` and `retail`, which are not part of the current classifier output. That is not the primary root cause because the strict `vertical in (beauty_brand, multi)` path already returns inventory.

details: Anonymous invocation is now blocked inside `feed-orchestrator`, `ingest-rss`, and `rss-to-signals`; all three return `401 Missing Authorization header` when called without a bearer token, while service-role invocations still return `200`.
`verify_jwt=false` remains required for deploy-time compatibility, but it is no longer a public execution path because every live handler now enforces service-role or admin access before work starts.
Server-side sanitization strips script/style/iframe/object/embed blocks, inline event handlers, javascript: URLs, and inline styles before writing article HTML.
Client-side `sanitizeArticleHtml()` now allowlists basic content tags and safe attrs before `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` is used in intelligence detail surfaces.
Client-side `normalizeMediaUrl()` decodes HTML-escaped media query params so `hero_image_url`, `image_url`, and `image_urls` render consistently from live data.
Signal detail pages fall back to plaintext `article_body` or the external `source_url` when full HTML is unavailable.

browser_visual_proof.service_worker_note: Playwright used `serviceWorkers: 'block'` because the local PWA offline path was returning `408 Offline` for external media in headless verification.

commands.command: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=<redacted> supabase functions list --project-ref rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi --output json
commands.output: feed-orchestrator v29 verify_jwt=false ACTIVE; ingest-rss v21 verify_jwt=false ACTIVE; rss-to-signals v20 verify_jwt=false ACTIVE

commands.command: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=<redacted> supabase functions deploy feed-orchestrator ingest-rss rss-to-signals --project-ref rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi --no-verify-jwt
commands.output: Deployed Functions on project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi: feed-orchestrator, ingest-rss, rss-to-signals

HTTP/2 200; the project currently has only 10 active `rss_sources`, so the live run could not numerically exceed the clamp. Handler inspection confirms `batch_size<=25` and `source_ids<=50` before query execution.

commands.command: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rss_sources WHERE status='active'
temporary admin JWT script -> create temp admin user, sign in, POST /functions/v1/feed-orchestrator with {"dry_run":true}, then delete temp profile and auth user
commands.output: HTTP/2 200; admin JWT invoke remained valid after the auth hardening.

commands.command: Playwright headless browser pass against http://127.0.0.1:4173/portal/intelligence with serviceWorkers='block'
commands.output: Saved `docs/qa/screenshots/portal_intelligence_overview_live.png` and `docs/qa/screenshots/portal_intelligence_detail_live.png`; overview showed 20 visible live rows with no sample-data banner, and the detail panel for signal 7a749484-1fd0-42ed-8750-8704d9e11d0a rendered a loaded hero image plus excerpt/action state and metadata badges.
vite build finished successfully in 6.77s; PWA generateSW completed

next_prs.title: PR-A: Merge ingestion auth hardening + proof pack
scope: Keep feed-orchestrator, ingest-rss, and rss-to-signals on function-level auth with service-role/admin-only execution.
Document deploy-time `verify_jwt=false` in supabase/config.toml and the required service-role Authorization header for cron/manual runs.
Ship the browser proof pack and auth matrix with the merge.

next_prs.title: PR-B: Mapping and data integrity hardening
scope: Continue classification cleanup for topic -> signal_type -> vertical mappings.
Reduce failing/degraded feed inventory using current `feed_run_log` evidence.
Add remediation for recurring 404/403/502 feeds surfaced by the scheduler burst.

next_prs.title: PR-C: UI consumption integrity and security hardening
scope: Keep sanitized article rendering on detail surfaces.
Review `beauty_brand` fallback topic list in `useIntelligence` so the fallback taxonomy matches current classifier outputs.
Preserve graceful image fallback when hero media is unavailable.

notes: The audit snapshot counts were taken at 2026-03-12T00:37:03.748Z. Inventory continued rising after that snapshot during the restore run; the earlier anonymous cron-shape path used for diagnosis has since been closed and now returns 401 without a bearer token.
Residual feed debt remains: 70 feeds are still marked failed and 47 degraded. The restored pipeline is live, but feed health cleanup should continue in PR-B.
refresh-live-data was not needed to restore `/portal/intelligence` inventory during this audit, but its deploy status should be addressed if any cache-refresh workflow still depends on it.
